title: Partition a set into two subsets with minimum absolute sum difference

content.problemStatement:
**Problem Description: **Given an array of n integers, partition the array into two subsets such that the absolute difference between their sums is minimized.







    
        
            **
                    Examples
                **
            
            
                
            
        
        
            <pre class="wp-
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer 'n' denoting the number of elements in the array. The second line contains 'n' space-separated integers denoting the elements of the array.
content.outputFormat: The minimum absolute difference between the sums of two subsets.

solution.approach: Use dynamic programming to find all possible subset sums and then calculate the minimum absolute difference between the sums of two subsets.
